entity.mapping_notes: Eurostat citizenship/destination code mapped without interpreting citizenship as residence or departure.

partial_periods.note: 2021 release covers January through June only.

policy_events.label: Malta Declaration on the Central Mediterranean

notes: Citizenship is used as a country-exposure proxy; it is not an observed departure country.
Applications, GTD incidents, and UCDP events are separate source measures and do not track the same people.
UCDP values use events wholly bounded within one calendar month; cross-month events remain excluded from this display.
The displayed UCDP uncertainty envelope spans the minimum and maximum of the published low, best, and high monthly sums; source values remain unchanged in DuckDB.
